name: longmem
description: Persistent memory daemon for OpenCode and Claude Code CLI

scripts.build: bun build ./daemon/server.ts --outfile dist/daemon.js --target bun && bun build ./mcp/server.ts --outfile dist/mcp.js --target bun && bun build ./hooks/post-tool.ts --outfile dist/hooks/post-tool.js --target bun && bun build ./hooks/prompt.ts --outfile dist/hooks/prompt.js --target bun && bun build ./hooks/stop.ts --outfile dist/hooks/stop.js --target bun && bun build ./install.ts --outfile dist/install.js --target bun && bun build ./uninstall.ts --outfile dist/uninstall.js --target bun
scripts.build:binaries: mkdir -p dist/bin && bun run build:binary:linux-arm64 && bun run build:binary:linux-x64 && bun run build:binary:macos-arm64 && bun run build:binary:macos-x64
